deploy.startCommand: sh -c "BACKEND_URL=\"${BACKEND_URL:-$PUBLIC_API_URL}\"; BACKEND_URL=\"${BACKEND_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:8000}\"; export BACKEND_URL; printf 'window.__BAZARIO_CONFIG__ = { API_URL: \"/api\" };\\n' > /usr/share/nginx/html/runtime-config.js && envsubst '$PORT $BACKEND_URL' < /etc/nginx/templates/default.conf.template > /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf && exec nginx -g 'daemon off;'"
